ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., time-lapse, fixed) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the frame belongs to */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number in the time series */,
  "time_aligned" REAL /* Time aligned to a reference point (e.g., start of the experiment) */,
  "time_seconds" REAL /* Time in seconds since the start of the experiment */,
  "intensity_ch3_t2" REAL /* Intensity measurement in channel 3 (T2) */,
  "background" REAL /* Background intensity */,
  "intensity_bg_subst" REAL /* Intensity after background subtraction */,
  "bleach_corrected" REAL /* Intensity after bleach correction */,
  "normalized" REAL /* Normalized intensity */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel (e.g., fluorescence channel) */,
  "image_quality" REAL /* Quality score or rating of the image */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of data processing (e.g., raw, processed, archived) */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the frame was last processed */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the image data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, lab technician) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the researcher's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was acquired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instrument (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)
